name: Abyssal
description: Connected to abyssal planes or demonic forces.

name: Accursed
description: Afflicted by or radiating a supernatural curse.

name: Animal
description: A natural animal with no supernatural abilities.

name: Beast
description: A large or monstrous creature with animal-like traits.

name: Construct
description: An artificial creature animated by magic or technology.

name: Devil
description: A fiendish creature from infernal planes.

name: Dragon
description: A draconic creature, typically with breath weapons and flight.

name: Dwarf
description: Of dwarven ancestry or origin.

name: Elemental
description: A creature composed of or powered by elemental forces.

name: Elf
description: Of elven ancestry or origin.

name: Fey
description: Connected to the fey realms or faerie courts.

name: Giant
description: An enormous humanoid creature.

name: Goblin
description: A small, cunning creature of goblinoid ancestry.

name: Humanoid
description: A creature of roughly human shape and intelligence.

name: Infernal
description: Connected to infernal planes.

name: Insect
description: A creature with insectoid features.

name: Monstrous
description: A creature that defies natural categorization.

name: Orc
description: Of orcish ancestry or origin.

name: Plant
description: A creature with plant-like biology.

name: Planar
description: Native to or strongly connected to another plane.

name: Revenant
description: A creature returned from death with purpose.

name: Shapechanger
description: A creature that can alter its physical form.

name: Undead
description: An animated corpse or spirit of a deceased creature.
